title: feat: adds cloudflare durable objects based storage adapter
summary: Adds a Cloudflare Durable Objects SQL-backed storage adapter to the existing @mastra/cloudflare package. The DO storage uses the 10GB SQLite backing surface attached to Durable Objects. Includes a full storage implementation (DODB layer, SqlBuilder, domain stores for memory/scores/workflows), refactors existing KV exports to a kv/ subdirectory, and updates documentation. Author reports production use at @helmerapp. Maintainer abhiaiyer91 approved the approach of consolidating into @mastra/cloudflare (rather than a separate package) and the author addressed CodeRabbit review comments, but the PR has gone stale since Feb 6.
maintainerNotes: External contributor from @helmerapp with real production usage. Maintainer abhiaiyer91 was engaged and supportive of the consolidation approach. Key issues: (1) merge conflicts need resolving, (2) no changeset added, (3) no new tests for DO storage adapter, (4) CI checks stuck in pending state, (5) only CodeRabbit bot reviews — needs human maintainer review. The author was responsive (27 commits addressing feedback) but hasn't updated in 32 days. Consider pinging the author to resolve conflicts and add changeset/tests, or take over completion internally given the production-validated implementation.
